inputs.label: Sample Mean
inputs.businessContext: The average value of the sample data collected from the process.

businessContext_i18n.en: The average value of the sample data collected from the process.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Süreçten toplanan örneklem verisinin ortalama değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Durchschnittswert der aus dem Prozess gesammelten Stichprobendaten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur moyenne des données de l'échantillon collectées à partir du processus.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor promedio de los datos de la muestra recolectados del proceso.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط قيمة بيانات العينة المجمعة من العملية.

inputs.label: Hypothesized Mean
inputs.businessContext: The value of the population mean under the null hypothesis.

businessContext_i18n.en: The value of the population mean under the null hypothesis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıfır hipotezi altındaki popülasyon ortalamasının değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Wert des Populationsmittelwerts unter der Nullhypothese.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur de la moyenne de la population sous l'hypothèse nulle.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor de la media poblacional bajo la hipótesis nula.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة المتوسط المجتمعي تحت الفرضية الصفرية.

inputs.label: Sample Standard Deviation
inputs.businessContext: The standard deviation of the sample data, measuring variability.

businessContext_i18n.en: The standard deviation of the sample data, measuring variability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Örneklem verisinin standart sapması, değişkenliği ölçer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Standardabweichung der Stichprobendaten, ein Maß für die Variabilität.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart type des données de l'échantillon, mesurant la variabilité.
businessContext_i18n.es: La desviación estándar de los datos de la muestra, que mide la variabilidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الانحراف المعياري لبيانات العينة، لقياس التباين.

inputs.label: Sample Size
inputs.businessContext: The number of observations in the sample (must be >1).

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of observations in the sample (must be >1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der Beobachtungen in der Stichprobe (muss >1 sein).
businessContext_i18n.es: El número de observaciones en la muestra (debe ser >1).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المشاهدات في العينة (يجب أن يكون >1).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
